name: No Cloud Logging log sink configured
description: No log sink is configured for the project. Without a log sink, audit logs and system logs are only retained in Cloud Logging for the default retention period (30–400 days depending on log type) and cannot be exported to long-term storage, SIEM systems, or compliance archives. Log sinks are required for incident response, forensic investigation, and long-term audit retention.
remediation: Create at least one log sink exporting to Cloud Storage (for long-term retention), BigQuery (for analysis), or Pub/Sub (for SIEM integration): gcloud logging sinks create SINK_NAME DESTINATION --log-filter=''. Ensure the sink's service account has write access to the destination. Consider an aggregated sink at the Organization level for centralised log management.
